overview: Belleza Glamorous Makeup Studio is a premium luxury 3D-animated website for a professional bridal makeup artist based in Vadodara, Gujarat. Features full Three.js 3D animations, glassmorphism UI, pinkish-whitish theme with glow effects, celebrity work showcase, gallery, appointment booking, Indian reviews, FAQ, and map section.
features: Full 3D animated hero section with floating particles and orbs
Premium pinkish-whitish glassmorphism UI with glow effects
Celebrity work showcase with animated certificate highlight
Complete services section with 3D animated cards
Indian client testimonials with animated cards
Appointment booking form with date/time selection
Why Choose Us section with animated stats
Smooth scroll navigation with sticky header
